title: Raise Consensus Threshold
summary: Raised agents_required_to_agree from 2 to 3 in config.py. 3/6 agents must agree to trade (paper). Live threshold remains 4. Shipped in Phase A commit (620e75d).
approach: Simple config change: agents_required_to_agree = 3. Verified in config.py line 68 with comment: '2/6 was rubber-stamping; 3/6 requires real consensus. (live: 4)'.
